name: codex-wechat-bridge
description: Local Codex Desktop plugin bundle for bridging WeChat private chats into Codex workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Operate a local WeChat bridge for Codex Desktop.
interface.longDescription: Adds local skills and MCP tools for QR login, diagnostics, conversation inspection, and manual WeChat replies without any OpenClaw runtime dependency.
defaultPrompt: Use WeChat Bridge to inspect pending WeChat messages before replying.
Use WeChat Bridge to diagnose login status or failed WeChat deliveries.
